messages.author: jhardy1979
messages.text: I set up a repeater at my house yesterday. I wasn't expecting much with the results since meshtastic is also lacking near my house but I will say going through the app meshcore seems like it is a little better if a network would ever be built out here in Oklahoma.
messages.content_html: I set up a repeater at my house yesterday. I wasn't expecting much with the results since meshtastic is also lacking near my house but I will say going through the app meshcore seems like it is a little better if a network would ever be built out here in Oklahoma.

messages.author: JonBons
messages.text: I would say our environment and terrain certainly would benefit from MC’s design over MT. Most of the MT infra is setup like you would MC anyway with a set of repeaters in good locations but were MT fails here is people with bad configs acting as repeaters and just black holing messages for a whole spot and eating up the limited hop count. Although if they update and start using zero hop routing, favoriting other good routes I’m sure reliably would improve but it feels hacky compared to MC’s design https://meshtastic.org/blog/zero-cost-hops-favorite-routers/ (edited)
messages.content_html: I would say our environment and terrain certainly would benefit from MC’s design over MT. Most of the MT infra is setup like you would MC anyway with a set of repeaters in good locations but were MT fails here is people with bad configs acting as repeaters and just black holing messages for a whole spot and eating up the limited hop count. Although if they update and start using zero hop routing, favoriting other good routes I’m sure reliably would improve but it feels hacky compared to MC’s design https://meshtastic.org/blog/zero-cost-hops-favorite-routers/ (edited)
embeds_html:
Zero-Cost Hops for Favorite Routers | Meshtastic
Stretch your mesh by stretching each hop by using zero-cost hops

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: the meshcore dev team have moved to a new discord server. details and reasons are here: https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/23/the-split Please create a new thread for your region in the https://discord.com/channels/1495203904898728149/1495412453150818585 for your region on the new meshcore.io discord server. https://meshcore.gg
